summary: The diff implements all three requirements: a WelcomePage component is created (REQ-1), App.tsx is updated with the 'welcome' initial view state and correct navigation flow (REQ-2), and a rich visual theme with NIRGRANTHA design tokens, gradients, typography, and decorative elements is applied (REQ-3). All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed. No significant hallucinations were detected beyond minor enhancements (feature cards) that are reasonable extensions of the welcome page scope.

hallucinated_features.description: Feature highlight cards (Academic Roadmap, Hackathon Network, AI-Powered Tools, Project Marketplace) displayed on the welcome page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify adding feature/product highlight cards to the welcome page. The requirements only call for a hero heading, brand name, and a CTA button. These cards are additional content not requested.
